lint.output: 1 pre-existing warning in flow-canvas.tsx (unused import) — known acceptable per LEARNINGS.md

notes: ATTEMPT 3 — playbook page nested under runbooks/[runbookId]/playbook/ (correct route). PlaybookView uses fixed full-viewport overlay (position fixed, inset-0, z-50, bg-[var(--surface)]) covering workspace shell — no workspace-shell.tsx changes needed. page.tsx copies exact Supabase query pattern from sibling runbook page.tsx. RunbookStepEnriched type imported from ../runbook-view. Mark Complete & Next: optimistic update + auto-advance to next pending/in_progress step. Dot navigation + progress bar + Step N of M counter. Both window.confirm() calls in runbook-view.tsx replaced with Radix Dialog (confirmCompleteOpen, confirmCancelOpen states). Complete dialog explains completion locks steps. Cancel dialog explains cancellation stops the runbook. Playbook Mode button added to runbook-view header using Button asChild + Link to ./playbook.
